initial_candidates.sql:
WITH italian_sales_2021_dec AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cust_id,
        s.amount_sold
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
),
tiered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        amount_sold,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount_sold) AS profit_tier
    FROM italian_sales_2021_dec
)
SELECT 
    MAX(amount_sold) AS highest_profit,
    MIN(amount_sold) AS lowest_profit
FROM tiered_sales;

WITH italian_sales_dec2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cust_id,
        s.amount_sold
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
),
tiered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        amount_sold,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount_sold) AS profit_tier
    FROM italian_sales_dec2021
)
SELECT 
    MAX(amount_sold) AS highest_profit,
    MIN(amount_sold) AS lowest_profit
FROM tiered_sales;

WITH italian_dec_2021_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cust_id,
        s.amount_sold
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
),
tiered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        amount_sold,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount_sold) AS profit_tier
    FROM italian_dec_2021_sales
)
SELECT 
    MAX(amount_sold) AS highest_profit,
    MIN(amount_sold) AS lowest_profit
FROM tiered_sales;

WITH italian_dec_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cust_id,
        s.amount_sold
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
),
tiered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        amount_sold,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount_sold) AS profit_tier
    FROM italian_dec_sales
)
SELECT 
    MAX(amount_sold) AS highest_profit,
    MIN(amount_sold) AS lowest_profit
FROM tiered_customers;

SELECT 
    MAX(amount_sold) AS highest_profit, 
    MIN(amount_sold) AS lowest_profit
FROM (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        amount_sold,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount_sold) AS profit_tier
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
) ranked_sales
WHERE profit_tier BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
